name: Agricultural Spray Drone Battery and Navigation Configuration
description: You are an agricultural technician preparing a new heavy-lift hexacopter spray drone for its first mission. The vehicle requires custom battery failsafes to prevent crashes when carrying heavy liquid payloads, as well as reduced navigation speeds for uniform chemical application. Configure the 10 critical parameters (7 for battery monitoring and 3 for navigation speeds) in QGroundControl using the exact values specified in the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/battery_nav_sop.txt.
